heading.title: Student Information & Status
heading.subtitle: You can review all your data, uploaded documents, and the status of each student section here

heading.title: Personal Information
heading.subtitle: This section contains the personal data submitted by the student

heading.title: Residence Information
heading.subtitle: This section includes information about the current residence and details provided by the student

heading.title: Pre-University Education
heading.subtitle: This section includes details of previous academic certificates and pre-university education data

heading.title: Academic Information
heading.subtitle: This section contains details of the college or study program and the applied major

heading.title: Guardian Information
heading.subtitle: This section includes information about the student’s guardian or responsible person, if provided

heading.title: Parents' Status
heading.subtitle: This section contains information about the social status of the parents and related data

heading.title: Medical Information
heading.subtitle: This section contains the health information disclosed by the student, if any

heading.title: Housing Information
heading.subtitle: The information you provided and your housing preferences

heading.title: Uploaded Documents Overview
heading.subtitle: Preview the documents the student has uploaded so far

delete.title: Confirm Application Cancellation
delete.description: Are you sure you want to cancel the application and delete all associated data? This action cannot be undone after confirmation.
